extDescription.message: Capture the current tab audio, process it like a live venue, and play it back in real time.

experimentalCopy.message: Optional tests that stay off by default.

errorCouldNotFindActiveTab.message: Could not find an active tab.

errorCouldNotStartTabAudioCapture.message: Could not start tab audio capture.

errorCouldNotStopTabAudioCapture.message: Could not stop tab audio capture.

hintRoomPreset.message: Chooses the base venue model, changing room size, tail behavior, reflection timing, and overall space character.

hintAudiencePosition.message: Moves the listener from near-front to farther-back or outside perspectives, changing distance, width, and wet balance.

hintCloneCount.message: Sets how many layered support voices are generated around the source to create ensemble width and venue spread.

hintDelayMs.message: Controls the base layer offset timing, affecting how tightly or loosely the live ensemble image opens up.

hintEnsembleVolume.message: Sets the base loudness of the duplicated support layers before room and distance shaping are applied.

hintVolumeDecay.message: Controls how quickly each additional layer loses level as the stack moves away from the lead layer.

hintReverbIntensity.message: Drives how strongly the wet buses are fed, affecting overall venue tail weight and depth.

hintDiffusionAmount.message: Controls how much the diffusion bus softens and spreads the reverb field into a denser wash.

hintAuxiliaryAmount.message: Scales the extra smear, blur, and reflection sends that create live-air and side-wall texture.

hintPeakSuppression.message: Tightens the master dynamics chain so dense mixes stay controlled and less spiky.

hintDirectMixTrim.message: Adjusts how present the dry direct signal remains against the venue processing.

hintPreDelayScale.message: Globally scales the early and late pre-delay timing so the room feels nearer or farther away.

hintTailGainScale.message: Raises or lowers the overall reverb tail energy after the room preset is chosen.

hintReflectionSpacing.message: Widens or compresses the timing gap between reflection taps for a tighter or larger wall feel.

hintDynamicWetTrimStrength.message: Changes how aggressively the adaptive wet system pulls reverb back when the source gets dense.

hintExperimentalLargeSpaceModulation.message: Adds subtle motion to large-room tails so arena and stadium presets feel less static.

hintExperimentalSubtleSpaceResponse.message: Adds a faint bloom behind the late tail to make large spaces feel less empty.

hintExperimentalCrowdReaction.message: Adds a low-level crowd-air bed behind the reverb for a stronger live venue impression.
